title: feat: add in-app setting for debug logs
body:
Add UI control (tray/settings) to enable and disable debug logging without relying on environment variables.

Acceptance criteria:
- [ ] UI switch for logging mode
- [ ] Persisted setting in registry/config
- [ ] Logging remains disabled by default

title: release: create v2.0.0 tag and publish GitHub release artifacts
body: Create and verify release tag on clean history. Ensure x64/x86 artifacts are attached and release notes are accurate.

title: ci: verify GitHub Actions pipeline after repository rename
body: Validate all workflows after move to ups-status-widget repository and fix any stale paths or artifact names.

title: feat: add update checker against latest GitHub release
body: Implement non-intrusive update check with current version comparison and optional prompt to open release page.

title: feat: add Windows installer (MSI or bootstrapper)
body: Ship an installer with Start Menu/Desktop options and clean uninstall path.

title: chore: audit GitHub settings after rename
body: Audit repository metadata, links, badges, branch protection, Actions permissions and other settings for old names.

title: chore: add .gitattributes for line endings normalization
body: Add .gitattributes to normalize EOL behavior across contributors and CI.

title: release: create repeatable release checklist
body: Document release flow including tagging, workflow verification, smoke testing and post-release checks.
